title: Things to know before your visit.
subtitle: Have a question? Find quick answers below or reach out to us directly.

items.question: Do you accept reservations?
items.answer: Yes, we accept reservations for both our main dining hall and our private party room. Call us at +91 9964-544555 to book your table.

items.question: Is there a separate vegetarian menu?
items.answer: Absolutely! We have an extensive vegetarian menu with over 25 options including starters, main courses, biryanis, and rice dishes.

items.question: Do you have a party hall for private events?
items.answer: Yes, we have a separate party room that can accommodate up to 50 guests. Perfect for birthday parties, kitty parties, and family celebrations.

items.question: What is the average cost for a meal?
items.answer: The average cost is ₹200-600 per person depending on your order. Family meals and special platters offer great value.

items.question: Is rooftop seating available?
items.answer: Yes! Our rooftop area is open during evenings and is perfect for a relaxed dining experience under the stars.

items.question: Do you offer takeaway and delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we offer takeaway for all menu items. Delivery is available within Tiptur city limits.
